prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-HPS-105-RD-TT Product Type: SAW Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Hand Pruning Saw Gardening Tool For Home Outdoor Plants Description: The Hand Pruning Saw with 5 inch blade is ideal for cutting branches both green and dead. This item is necessary for gardening, camping survival kits, and more.

The triple teeth saw blade is designed to prevent wood from stick in the blade. Durable plastic handle with rubber grip makes sawing easier on your hands. Blade length is 5 inches and the overall length is 10.5 inches when the blade is unfolded.

An additional safety feature for this product is the safety release button which stops the blade from releasing on its own. Search Terms: camping survival gardening pruning saw Features: - HAND PRUNING SAW: Triple teeth saw blade design provides a super sharp and effective cutting edge reducing overexertion - SAW SPECIFICATIONS: Closed Length: 6.25" | Open Length: 10.5" - SAW SAFETY MECHANISM: Safety release button on the handle to close and lock the blade - COMFORT GRIP ERGONOMIC HANDLE: Slightly curved, knurled rubberized plastic handle for a no-slip grip - MULTIPURPOSE :Great tool for camping, gardening, home, survival/emergency kits, and more === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux Hand Pruning Saw 5 inch Blade Gardening Tool

anthropic.title_differentiation: Triple Teeth Blade, Safety Release Lock, Ergonomic Rubber Grip, Camping And Survival

openai.title_differentiation: Triple Teeth Blade, 5 Inch Cutting Edge, Safety Release Button, Rubber Grip Handle, Camping And Gardening
